title: Cancer Research: Cross-Literature Analysis and Ferroptosis Simulation
description: Open-source cancer research combining cross-literature analysis of 4,830 research articles with Monte Carlo biochemical simulations of ferroptosis sensitivity. Includes Python analysis pipeline (13 scripts), Rust simulation engine (ferroptosis-core, 10 binaries, 31 unit tests), 23 manuscript figures with traceability index, and a 112-page book-format manuscript (~33,600 words). Full-text corpus articles are excluded for licensing reasons; corpus/INDEX.jsonl provides metadata (PMIDs, mechanisms, cancer types, evidence tiers) for reconstruction from PubMed. See PROVENANCE.yaml for asset licensing details.
